title: No Wind Charge & Explosion Effects
description: Removes intrusive wind charge swirls and explosion particles for better visibility and performance.
body:
## ✨ Features
This resource pack is designed for players who want a cleaner, more focused gameplay experience. It removes the bulky visual effects that can clutter your screen during combat or explosions.

* **No Wind Swirls:** Removes the spiraling particle effects from Wind Charges, giving you better visibility during Trial Chambers and mace pvp.
* **Clean Explosions:** Disables the large smoke and flash particles from TNT and Creepers, which is perfect for PvP or low-end PCs.
* **Performance Friendly:** By reducing particle rendering, this pack can help slightly improve FPS in explosion-heavy situations.

## 🛠 Installation
1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Open Minecraft and go to **Options** > **Resource Packs**.
3. Drag and drop the file into the window and move it to the **Selected** side.

## 👤 Credits & Usage
Created by **NotGalib**.
